properties.verseOrder: v1 v2 v3 v4 v5 v6 v7 v8

verse.name: v1
verse.lines: Why am I such a dusty window for Your light to shine through Why am I just a tiny star in a sky already blue Why do I offer everything with my heart closed like a fist I want to love You better than this

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: Why do I live like I'm in chains when You have set me free Why do I have to break Your heart before I fall to my knees I know it's time to pray for change, give all I have to give I want to love You better than this

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: So renew me, remake me, undo me, unbreak me Come into the empty spaces of my broken places And consume me, complete me, pursue me, redeem me Let Your Holy Spirit live in through me Renew me Lord renew me

verse.name: v4
verse.lines: I need You as my refuge, my first and last resort Be the river always running through my deepest thoughts Keep me in Your arms'cause even when I drift I want to love You better than this

verse.name: v5
verse.lines: So renew me, remake me, undo me, unbreak me Come into the empty spaces of my broken places And consume me, complete me, pursue me, redeem me Let Your Holy Spirit live in through me Renew me Renew me Oh renew me Lord

verse.name: v6
verse.lines: My life bending to Your will Seeking You until I'm more and more like You

verse.name: v7
verse.lines: So renew me Lord, renew me Come into the empty spaces of my broken places And consume me, complete me, pursue me, redeem me Let Your Holy Spirit live in through me Renew me Renew me Renew me

verse.name: v8
verse.lines: Please renew me oh Lord I need You to renew me
